titleStmt.title: SII 41.227: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 227. (A.R. No. 446 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vijayarāghava-Perumāḻ temple at Tiruttaṇi.

summary.p: Fragment, containing a portion of the meykkīrtti introduction of Rājēndra Chōḻa I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumanni vaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum poṟccayap pāvaiyuñ cirtaṉiccelviyun tanperunteviyarākiyiṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ ṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tamuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyumunnavar pakkalt tennavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum I teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar
pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkativelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻantivuñ ceruvic ciṉavi Irupattorukālaraicukaḷaikkaṭṭa paracirāmanmel varuñ cāntimat tivaraṇ ttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅka ṉaḷap
perum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum navane(t)tik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturai maṇṭalamum kāmiṭai vaṉaiya nāmaṉaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaippa
ḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvillavaṉ kirtti Ātinakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉ ṟol kulattintirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷatiṟ kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyuñ kiṭṭaruñcerimiḷai yoṭṭavi
ṣaiyamum pūcurar cernal kocalaināṭum taṉma pālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum tikkaṇa cirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=tacan=taṉmāviḻintoṭat taṅkāta cāral
vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭal mayipālanai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi yoṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teṟipuṉal
Digital edition of SII 41.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
